text:
Hmm..

when not using DXVK then the issue is gone.

Is it still worth to report then?

I mean.. the used dxvk version is 1.10.3 which is one year old but yet the issue was fixed (by switching from stable mesa 22.3.7 to mesa-devel) and then it returned in 23.2.0.b.2280 after months)
